package.name: HexFill
package.description: Fill any sketch with a honeycomb pattern in one click. Pick a sketch, choose the cell size, and HexFill builds the whole hexagonal grid for you - ready to Pocket into a lightweight perforated panel or Pad into a honeycomb solid. Manual or automatic sizing, edge trimming and a live 3D preview. Several closed regions in one sketch are filled at once.
package.author: Clientik

workbench.name: HexFill
workbench.description: Fill a sketch with a honeycomb (hexagonal) grid, ready for Pad or Pocket.
